sourceRefs: DRAFT — C1 technique unit. Covers le résumé de texte: the contract (same voice incl. je, same order, no commentary, own words, quarter-length quota), the three-pass method (squelette → élaguer → reformuler dense), nominalisation as compression (spirals from b1.1/unit-07), with a worked original-vs-résumé reading. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego 5 C1>C2 (Hachette), Dossier 3 'Socialement vôtre' ('Techniques pour faire un résumé de texte'). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
